titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 62: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 62. (A.R. No. 291 of 1908.) TIRUKKAḶITTAṬṬAI, KUMBAHKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vēdapurīśvara temple.

p.hi: Sundarachōḷa, who drove the Pāṇḍya into the forest Year 7: 964 A.D.

summary.p: It records that Pirāntaka Siṟiyavēḷān alias Tirukkaṟṟaḷi-Pichchaṉ, who was serving as a general of the king purchased a plot of land called taḷi-viḷāgam, half-a-vēḷi in extent, and also got it freed from taxes with 156 kaḷañju of gold, he had endowed for providing ritualistic offerings of food for the god Śrī Kuḍittiṭṭai uḍaiyār at Vembaṟṟūr on the northern bank of the (river Kāvēri).
Published in Ep. Ind. Vol. XII. p. 126.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pāṇṭiyaṉ cura(m)miṟakkina perumāḷ śrīcuntracoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu 7 vatu vaṭakarai vempaṟṟūr
śrīkuṭittiṭṭai Uṭaiyaāṟku Ipperumā(ḷ)ḷukku senāpatyam cekiṟa pirāntakan ciṟiyaveḷā
nanāna tirukkaṟṟaḷi piccanne(n) Itdevaṟku tirumantraponakattukku nān cempoṉ 100 5 10 6 kaḻa
ñcuṅ kuṭuttu koṇṭu Iṟaiyili cetu koṭutta nilamāvatu Itdevar śrīkoyilukku vaṭakku tirukkuḷa
ttukku vaṭakku taḷiviḷākam Enṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilam Araiyum Itdevaṟku tirumantraponaka
ttukku cantrādityavaṟ celvatāka Iṟaiyiḻicci kuṭutten pirāntakan ciṟiya veḷāna(n)āna tirukkaṟṟaḷi piccananeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 62 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
